# Templates

Use these templates to make requests repeatable and to reduce prompt drift.

## Available templates

- [agent-brief-template.md](agent-brief-template.md) — define one role's task, scope, and output
- [task-template.md](task-template.md) — write a complete task brief for project work
- [handoff-template.md](handoff-template.md) — transfer work between roles or people

## How to use templates well

- keep the title specific
- state success conditions explicitly
- separate known facts from assumptions
- include validation requirements
- capture follow-up risks and open questions

## When to copy vs link

- Copy a template into a project-specific folder when the task is long-lived.
- Link to the template when the task is short-lived and only needs light adaptation.
